notes: Pure leaf file: axiom-clean construction of the arithmetic Frobenius ring automorphism of K̄(E), used as the 'q-power on constants' leaf for FrobeniusGaloisData in FrobeniusGaloisScaling.lean and FrobeniusConjugation.lean. The key design choice (RingEquiv.cast for codomain transport instead of ▸) avoids whnf timeout on the curve-indexed FunctionField type. No sorries, no maxHeartbeats bumps, no long proofs.
